note: Live terminology-server endpoints, sourced from data/digital_tablet_omnibus.json (_digitalTablet.terminology_servers). Used ONLY in live mode; mock mode NEVER calls them. Live NCTS/Ontoserver grounding of SNOMED CT-AU content requires an NCTS licence/account (input-gated). These are public reference URLs, not secrets.
